title: WidenPendingEntry
description: One line in widen-pending.jsonl. Represents a widened DecisionPoint that the interview has moved past (user chose [c]ontinue). Owned by specify_cli.widen.state.WidenPendingStore.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Must be 1 for this version of the sidecar format.

decision_id.description: ULID of the DecisionPoint in the decisions index.

question_id.description: Dotted step_id of the interview question, e.g. 'charter.technical_constraints'.

question_text.description: Full human-readable question text as shown in the interview prompt.

entered_pending_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the user pressed [c] and the question was parked.

widen_endpoint_response.description: Raw JSON response from POST /api/v1/decision-points/{id}/widen (spec-kitty-saas #110). Stored for debug/audit. Exact shape owned by #110.
